commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor WS-path proof plus a small security fix to the limiter reset placement; automation should not take over while external real-behavior proof is still insufficient.; Needs attention: The diff improves the unauthenticated crypto path, but the new signature limiter is still cleared before final device admission.; Review finding: [P2] Defer signature-bucket reset until device admission — src/gateway/serv... (sha=facb002ff87e909483335b58f75d882fa5c08847)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds device public-key/signature bounds, device-identity shape pre-checks, a per-IP device-signature auth-rate-limit scope in the Gateway WS connect handler, regression tests, a PoC script, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main derives the device id and runs v3/v2 signature verification before final auth and pairing/access admission; the PR body also includes pre-fix PoC timing from a running gateway, but I did not run the live gateway in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor WS-path proof plus a small security fix to the limiter reset placement; automation should not take over while external real-behavior proof is still insufficient.

target.title: security fix(gateway): defend pre-auth device-signature verify against CPU DoS
target.author: fede-kamel

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
